summary: Tested all Admin Universities CRUD endpoints. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Endpoints tested: Universities CRUD, Courses CRUD, Evaluations CRUD, Questions CRUD, Logo upload/serve, AI question generation, Stats summary, and Authentication.
critical_code_review_comments: All endpoints correctly require Bearer token authentication
University creation uses Form data (not JSON) to support file uploads
AI generation endpoint uses Emergent LLM (emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat) with session_id - working correctly
Cascade delete works correctly: deleting university removes courses, evaluations, and questions

test_credentials.token_generation: cd /app/backend && python3 -c 'from jose import jwt; from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone; import os; from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv(".env"); t=jwt.encode({"sub": os.environ.get("ADMIN_USERNAME"), "exp": datetime.now(timezone.utc)+timedelta(minutes=480)}, os.environ.get("ADMIN_SECRET_KEY"), algorithm="HS256"); print(t)'

seed_data_creation: Test data created during tests with prefix 'TEST_' and cleaned up after tests. Stats show: 2 universities, 2 courses, 2 evaluations, 3 questions in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Universities module fully tested. All CRUD endpoints for Universities->Courses->Evaluations->Questions hierarchy working. AI generation uses Emergent LLM integration (emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat with session_id). Logo uploads work with multipart form data. Stats endpoint returns counts for universities, courses, evaluations, questions, and questions_by_source breakdown.

features_tested.GET /api/admin/universities: PASS - List all universities with courses_count
features_tested.POST /api/admin/universities: PASS - Create university with Form data (name, short_name, city, logo)
features_tested.GET /api/admin/universities/{id}: PASS - Get university details with courses list
features_tested.DELETE /api/admin/universities/{id}: PASS - Delete university with cascade (courses, evaluations, questions)
features_tested.GET /api/admin/universities/logo/{filena: PASS - Serve logo file (no auth required)
features_tested.POST /api/admin/universities/{uid}/cours: PASS - Create course with JSON (name, code, description, department)
features_tested.GET /api/admin/universities/{uid}/course: PASS - Get course with evaluations list
features_tested.POST /api/admin/universities/{uid}/cours: PASS - Create manual question with Markdown/LaTeX
features_tested.GET /api/admin/universities/stats/summar: PASS - Get totals and questions_by_source breakdown
